2605.04740.title: AICoFe: Implementation and Deployment of an AI-Based Collaborative Feedback System for Higher Education
2605.04740.paper_summary: Effective peer feedback is essential for developing critical reflection in higher education, yet its impact is often limited by the inconsistent quality of student-generated comments. This paper presents the implementation and deployment of AICoFe (AI-based Collaborative Feedback), a system designed to bridge this gap through a human-centered AI approach. We describe a modular architecture that orchestrates a multi-LLM pipeline, utilizing GPT-4.1-mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Llama 3.1, to synthesize quantitative rubric data and qualitative observations into coherent, actionable feedback. Key to the system is a "teacher-in-the-loop" mediation workflow, where educators use specialized Learning Analytics dashboards to curate and refine AI-generated drafts before delivery. Furthermore, we detail the underlying data infrastructure, which employs a hybrid SQL and MongoDB strategy to ensure traceability and manage semi-structured feedback versions.
2605.04740.paper_summary_zh: 有效的同儕反饋對於高等教育中發展批判性反思至關重要，但其影響常常受到學生生成評論質量不一致的限制。本文介紹了 AICoFe（基於 AI 的協作反饋）的實施和部署，這是一個旨在通過以人為本的 AI 方法來彌補這一差距的系統。我們描述了一個模組化架構，協調多個 LLM 管道，利用 GPT-4.1-mini、Gemini 2.5 Flash 和 Llama 3.1，將定量評分標準數據和定性觀察綜合成連貫、可行的反饋。系統的關鍵是一個「教師介入」的調解工作流程，教育者使用專門的學習分析儀表板來策劃和完善 AI 生成的草稿，然後再進行交付。此外，我們詳細說明了基礎數據基礎設施，該基礎設施採用混合 SQL 和 MongoDB 策略，以確保可追溯性並管理半結構化的反饋版本。
2605.04740.author: Alvaro Becerra et.al.
2605.04740.authors: Alvaro Becerra, Alejandra Palma, Ruth Cobos
